creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Log:
  www/webkit2-gtk3: Update to 2.20.0

  - Add WAYLAND option
  - Bump PORTREVISION of dependents
  - Fix build of epiphany 3.24.2 with newer WebKit versions
